{{Infobox location
| name = Moongrave
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Moongrave Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Moongrave serves as the capital city for the [[Akura clan]] and is situated at the heart of the [[Ashwind continent]]. The city is characterized by a dark, artistic aesthetic that resembles a paradise, featuring black-leafed trees and gardens filled with glowing blue, white, and pink flowers known as [[Moongrave amphelia]]. These plants thrive due to the abundant [[shadow aura]] present throughout the area, which is also noted for being thick and calming. The city's landscape includes dark towers and lanes of cloudships that travel through the sky, alongside flying remnants and sacred birds used for transportation. Moongrave is a significant location for training, housing [[shadow aura]] cultivation rooms and various clan elders. It is also protected by advanced defensive [[scripts]] and spatial anchors, such as a large tower used for transportation. Despite its strength, the city has faced extreme danger, including being targeted by a [[Dreadgod]] and suffering from fires. Because of its importance to the [[Akura clan]], losing control of Moongrave would significantly diminish [[Malice]]'s power.}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Moongrave]] is a location where [[Lindon]] and [[Dross]] have been researching.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Located closer to the west coast of the [[Blackflame Continent]] than previous destinations, Moongrave served as a central setting for several key encounters. While [[Mercy]] practiced within a [[shadow aura]] cultivation room at the heart of the location, [[Lindon]] faced mistreatment from Douji and [[Courage]]. The site also served as the place where [[Charity]] was discovered. During his time there, [[Akura Justice]] performed an examination of [[Lindon]]'s spirit.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The west coast of the [[Blackflame Continent]] is closer to them than [[Moongrave]] was.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] sits in a [[shadow aura]] cultivation room at the heart of [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Douji and [[Courage]] treated [[Lindon]] poorly in [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Moongrave]] is a location where [[Charity]] is found.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Justice]] examined [[Lindon]]'s spirit in [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Moongrave is a dark city characterized by its spires of smooth black stone. While a cloudship drifted over the location, [[Malice]] utilized a tower situated beneath the city to send people. The area possesses an [[aura]] that is notably rich and thick when compared to [[Sacred Valley]]. During the events at this location, [[Lindon]] vanished from Moongrave.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Moongrave]] is a dark city with spires of smooth black stone.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The cloudship was drifting over [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] used a tower beneath [[Moongrave]] to send people.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Moongrave]] has an [[aura]] that is rich and thick compared to [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] vanished from [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s family and cloud fortress are at [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] set up transportation between [[Refuge]] and [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Moongrave]] is a city where [[Akura Malice]]'s voice can be heard by everyone.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] abandoned [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Moongrave is a city located at the heart of the [[Ashwind continent]], characterized by dark skies, cold winds, and black walls reminiscent of [[Shatterspine Castle]]. Connected to the Tower via a portal, the city serves as a defensive stronghold featuring script-circles worked into its foundation and a network of [[construct]] defenders. After [[Charity]] ordered a retreat to the location, it became a destination for [[Lindon]], [[Yerin]], and [[Mercy]], though [[Mercy]] initially found herself stuck there. The city faced immense peril when the [[Wandering Titan]] set a course for it and the [[Dreadgod]] focused its will upon the site, causing Moongrave to catch fire as the [[Silent King]]'s dream technique washed over it. Throughout these events, the city utilized its dream script and provided support to keep [[Lindon]] locked down.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">20</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] is stuck in [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] ordered a retreat to [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] is connected to the Tower via a portal.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] is a location with black walls similar to those of [[Shatterspine Castle]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Wandering Titan]] is on a course to [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] is a city.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] has dark skies and cold winds.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] contains a guest house.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] is a city with script-circles worked into its foundation for defense.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] has walls with [[scripts]] at the base.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] is a city with a [[construct]] network of defenders.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Silent King]]'s dream technique washed over [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] was on fire.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] has a dream script.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Dreadgod]] focuses its will on the city of [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] is the heart of the [[Ashwind continent]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] thought they were in [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] is a location where [[Lindon]], [[Yerin]], and [[Mercy]] arrive.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] has walls.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave]] provides support to keep [[Lindon]] locked down.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Moongrave is a location situated near the area where [[Reigan Shen]] returned and is mentioned in association with [[Serpent's Grave]]. During the events of the story, [[Malice]] fled to this location, which subsequently came under attack by the [[Wandering Titan]]. [[Northstrider]] eventually returned to Moongrave, a place that [[Lindon]] might also visit in the future. While it is a known site, the crowds found in its new world appeared less colorful than one might typically expect.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s father is not mentioned much in [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Moongrave]] is a location near where [[Reigan Shen]] returned.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Moongrave]] is a location [[Lindon]] and [[Northstrider]] might return to.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] ran to [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Moongrave]] was attacked by the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] returns to [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The crowd in the new world was less colorful than one might expect in [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Moongrave]] is a location mentioned alongside [[Serpent's Grave]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Moongrave]] is a location where flowers can be plucked.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Very little,” he said. “He isn’t mentioned much in Moongrave.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|"If I win, you both return to Moongrave until the Weeping Dragon is defeated or I am."<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“The Grave? Like Serpent’s Grave? And Moongrave?”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
